title: Spicy Gherkin and Garlic Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Chinese-inspired stir fry made with gherkin and garlic. Perfect as a side dish or used as a topping for noodles or rice.

ingredients.name: Bliss
ingredients.notes: Note: 'Bliss' is assumed to be a type of sweet potato. If not, adjust the ingredient accordingly.

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced bliss and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add the gherkin and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until the gherkin starts to soften.
Serve hot over rice or noodles, garnished with additional gherkin if desired.
